# Primary Button

Figma: https://www.figma.com/file/example/primary-button

## Usage

Primary button for the main transaction CTA.

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `label` | `String` | Yes | `-` | Main button copy |
| `onPressed` | `VoidCallback?` | No | `-` | Tap callback |
| `isLoading` | `bool` | No | `false` | Shows a spinner state |

## Dependencies

- flutter_svg: ^2.0.0
